chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Misc. Application No.546 of 2024 Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro Mr. Justice Syed Fiaz ul Hassan Shah Applicant:- The State/ANF through Mr. Mohsin Ali Khan, Special Prosecutor ANF. Respondent:- Dad Muhammad through Mr. Mallag Assa Dashti, advocate. Date of hearing:- 10.02.2026 =============== MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Allegedly a parcel containing 06 Kgs ICE was brought by co-accused Bilal, purportedly an employee of O.S. Corporation and got it booked with a courier company for shipping to Lahore on 12.09.2023. The courier company found the parcel suspicious, called ANF which checked it and found in it aforesaid narcotics. Hence, they arrested co-accused Bilal who disclosed respondent to be the owner of the company and involved in this case. 2. On the basis of such statement and the fact that respondent was the owner of the company which had purportedly got the parcel booked for shipping to Lahore, he was made an accused. However, by the trial Court, he has been granted pre arrest bail vide order dated 01.03.2024. 3. The case of ANF for cancellation of bail is that respondent is admittedly owner of the company which had got the parcel booked for shipping to Lahore. 4. Be that as it may, prima facie there is no evidence that respondent was in knowledge of the parcel being booked by its company or the fact that it contained narcotics as alleged which makes his case to be of further inquiry. Therefore, we find no illegality in the impugned order granting bail to the applicant. Consequently, the application is dismissed. The Cr. Misc. Application is accordingly disposed of in above terms.
Misc. Application is accordingly disposed of in above terms. JUDGE hanif JUDGE
